caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio, speaking into a professional black microphone. The background features a white wall adorned with several framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments. A white mannequin dressed in a white t-shirt and green pants stands to the man's left. In the bottom corners of the scene, there are logos; one reads "DREAM" inside a black rectangle, and the other reads "BODILY" in red text. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, slightly shifting his facial expression and head position while remaining seated in front of the microphone. The overall setting remains static, with no other people entering the frame.
